div.p: Reclamation algorithm for crashed producer recovery
4. CHECK CLAIM AGE cpp claim_time = slot[i] .claim_timestamp_ns age = now_ns() - claim_time
5. CHECK OWNER ALIVE cpp owner_slot = slot[i].owner_slot owner_pid = registry[owner_slot].pid // Signal 0 = check existence if (kill(owner_pid, 0) == -1 && errno == ESRCH) → Owner DEAD
6. VALIDATE FENCE cpp slot_fence = slot[i].fence .load(acquire) owner_fence = fence_mgr .get_fence(owner_slot) // Fence mismatch = stale claim if (slot_fence < owner_fence) → SAFE to reclaim
7. CAS RECLAMATION cpp expected = ref success = slot[i].ref_count .compare_exchange_strong( expected, 0, acq_rel, acquire )
8. LOG RECLAMATION cpp LOG("Reclaimed slot %zu", i) reclaimed_count++ fence_mgr.update_min_active( slot_fence + 1)
Safety Guarantee: CAS prevents reclaimer/owner race. Fences prevent PID reuse collision.
